summary: Recording suffers from mislabelled second set and missing 16‑kbps/44 kHz files, with no clear comment on performance quality
review: The sole review points out that the second set is mislabeled and that the expected 16/44 versions are absent from the archive. No musical or audio fidelity details are provided, making it hard to assess the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a zero‑star rating focusing on labeling and missing files; no positive aspects mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Second set mislabeled; 16/44 bitrate versions not available on the archive.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a mislabeling issue with the second set but gives no feedback on musical flow.
